message:
fix(mermaid): fix activation bar alignment and node index mapping

Activation renderer fixes:
- Derive message_gap and start_y from actual layout edge waypoints
  instead of hardcoded spacing_rank_gap=2.0, so activation bars
  align correctly when layout spacing differs from the default
- Build ir.nodes -> participant column mapping in activation
  renderer, so bars render on correct lifelines when note nodes
  or other non-participant nodes exist in ir.nodes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
